pause.title: Game Paused
pause.subtitle: Take a breather and come back!

pause.title: Timeout
pause.subtitle: The best ideas come from relaxation.

pause.title: Paused
pause.subtitle: Your progress is saved. Take your time!

pause.title: Break Time
pause.subtitle: Step away and let your mind wander.

pause.title: Intermission
pause.subtitle: Great puzzlers know when to pause.

incorrect.title: Close!
incorrect.subtitle: You're on the right track. Check your answers.

incorrect.title: Almost There
incorrect.subtitle: A few more corrections and you'll have it!

incorrect.title: Keep Trying
incorrect.subtitle: The best puzzles are worth the challenge.

incorrect.title: Try Again
incorrect.subtitle: Success is just one more attempt away.

correct.title: Brilliant!
correct.subtitle: You're mastery over crossword is remarkable!

correct.title: Congratulations!
correct.subtitle: You've cracked every clue with finesse!

revealed.title: Puzzle Revealed
revealed.subtitle: Sometimes we all need a little help!

revealed.title: All Solved
revealed.subtitle: The full grid has been revealed.

revealed.title: Complete
revealed.subtitle: Every answer has been filled in for you.

revealed.title: Revealed
revealed.subtitle: No shame in checking the answers!

cooldown.title: Time's Up!
cooldown.subtitle: Take a break and come back refreshed!

cooldown.title: Timeout
cooldown.subtitle: Great puzzlers know when to rest.

cooldown.title: Cool Down
cooldown.subtitle: Use this time to sharpen your wordplay!

cooldown.title: Intermission
cooldown.subtitle: The best is yet to come!

restart.title: Restart Game?
restart.subtitle: This will clear all progress and start fresh.

restart.title: Start Over?
restart.subtitle: All your progress will be lost. Are you sure?

restart.title: Fresh Start?
restart.subtitle: This will reset everything and begin again.
